channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Add a Little Whimsy to Your Study Routine: Silent Reads @ Folsom Library on July 15th
item.description: Date: Wednesday, July 15th, 2026, from 2 pm – 4 pm. Join RPI Libraries for a study break with our July Silent Reads on July 15th— a relaxed, low-pressure gathering where people read together in silence. No discussions, no pressure, just a calm space to settle in with a good book or some coursework. If you’re not feeling reading that day, you can use the space for puzzles, crafts, or try out a new study location. Please visit the full announcement to RSVP for event updates!
item.author: Students

item.title: Invited talk: Key: A Knowledge Engineering Harness by François Scharffe
item.description: Date: Wednesday, July 8, 2026, at 3:30 PM. Where: Winslow Building, Room 1140. Tetherless World Constellation will be hosting François Scharffe this week for an invited talk. François is a hands-on enterprise knowledge architect and semantic AI leader. His career spans enterprise engineering, data and AI strategy consulting, product leadership, research, and community building. François is a founder of the Knowledge Graph Conference, a leading forum for knowledge-centric AI technologies.
item.author: Community

item.title: Easton’s Birthday Paw-ty & Campus Cupboard Reveal
item.description: Date: Friday, July 10, 2026 11:30 AM - 1:00 PM - Happy 13th Birthday Easton! Join Presidential Pup Easton to celebrate his 13th Birthday. Stop by to pet or just say Happy Birthday and enjoy ice pops! Our event is taking place in the new home of the Campus Cupboard, formerly the student pantry. Please join us in viewing the new and improved location. During the Celebration: Tour the newly renovated Campus Cupboard, learn about this important Student Support Program, discover ways to donate…
item.author: Community

item.title: RPI Libraries announce a change to Ebook Central downloads – farewell to Adobe Digital Editions
item.description: During the week of July 13, the new Ebook Central Reader App will replace Adobe Digital Editions as the primary offline reading solution for full downloads of Ebook Central ebooks. The new Ebook Central Reader App is a dedicated mobile and desktop app offering a more streamlined, secure, and accessible experience. The app, available on Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android, supports EPUB and PDF formats and allows users to manage their loans and devices. Learn More…
item.author: Community

item.title: Volunteer for New Student Orientation and NRB!
item.description:
FYE is looking for enthusiastic volunteers to help welcome our new students and their families to campus. This is a great way to connect with colleagues, spread some school spirit, and be part of an unforgettable kickoff to the year. Sign up to volunteer here: https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0445A8A92FA6F5C34-64354400-fall Questions? Email fye@rpi.edu.

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
